label: Key binding category
description: Groups related key bindings and specifies which other categories are checked for conflicts when assigning keys.

isGameUniversal.label: Is game universal
isGameUniversal.description: If true, these key bindings are active in all game modes rather than only when the relevant context is open. Used for camera, global game controls, and main tabs.

checkForConflicts.label: Check for conflicts
checkForConflicts.description: List of KeyBindingCategoryDefs whose keys are compared against this category when detecting conflicts. Keys shared across listed categories will be reported as conflicting.

selfConflicting.label: Self conflicting
selfConflicting.description: If true, two key bindings within this category cannot share the same key. Set to false for modifier categories such as Modifiers where sharing keys is intentional.

basic-category.label: Basic category
basic-category.description: Key binding category with a label and conflict checking.
